label: The Attested Loft
description: The Attested Loft serves as an upper-room lodging within The Writ and Tankard, reached above the soot-stained gable and its posted ordinances. A low, timbered ceiling and smoke-dark rafters hang over a narrow bedstead and a plain desk scored by years of ink and knife marks. The walls are limewashed over older stone, their patched cracks mirroring Varric Holdfast’s salvaged ashlar and newer brickwork. A small shuttered window admits a disciplined strip of light, and a nailed placard restates house rules with the same licensing cadence as the tavern below.
